identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a unique, emotionally resonant interface for a window washing AI agent service. Avoid generic SaaS tropes. Blend 'Service Professionalism' with 'High-Tech Efficiency'.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Cleaning Service' trust with 'AI Tech' precision.
Content is King: The 'Call' is the hero.
Zoom In: Focus on the details of the conversation.
Negative Space: Use white space to imply cleanliness.

headings.usage: Main headings, Hero text. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Body text, UI elements, Data tables.

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500;700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400&display=swap');

primary.name: Crystal Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, Active states, Brand accents.

spacing.base: Use generous padding. p-8 or p-12 for sections.
spacing.containers: Max width 1280px for main content. Centered.

grid.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Sidebar: col-span-2. Main: col-span-10.

layout.radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

buttons.primary: bg-sky-500 hover:bg-sky-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-sky-500/25 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6 py-6 font-medium

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow rounded-xl p-6

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-sky-500 focus:ring-sky-500/20 rounded-lg h-12

status_indicators.live: animate-pulse bg-green-500 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full inline-block mr-2
status_indicators.offline: bg-slate-300 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full inline-block mr-2

hero_bg.alt: Modern home with sparkling clean windows
hero_bg.usage: Hero section background or side image.

ai_agent.usage: AI Demo section, representing the 'voice' of the AI.

sections: Hero: 'Crystal Clear Windows, Intelligent Service'. Split layout with Form on left, Image on right.
AI Demo: 'Talk to our AI Agent'. Interactive audio visualizer component.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (Home, Calls, Schedule, Settings). Top bar with User Profile.
widgets: Stats Row: Total Calls, Leads Captured, Revenue Est.
Live Call Feed: List of recent AI interactions with status badges.
Calendar Preview: Upcoming jobs for the week.

universal_guidelines.interactions: All interactive elements must have hover states. Use 'transform hover:-translate-y-1' for cards.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast is > 4.5:1. Use aria-labels on icon buttons.
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and major containers.
universal_guidelines.cleanliness: Avoid clutter. If in doubt, add more padding.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React app. Use the existing Shadcn components in /src/components/ui. Customize them via className props to match the 'Crystal Blue' and 'Clean Slate' aesthetic. Do not use default Shadcn styling blindly; inject the brand personality. For the AI Call simulation, create a visualizer that reacts to 'voice' (mocked) to make it feel alive.
